posts.author: hosseini (Khash)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone. I need your help.

I have two fields: the first field is a date field called contract start date. A date is entered here. the second field is a runtime field. The term of the contract is entered here in months. Now I need a third field in which the end date is automatically calculated.

Many thanks for your help

khash

posts.author: eninyo (Eliah Ninyo)
posts.cookedHtml:
hosseini:

which the end date is automatically calculated

Hi, i’m looking for the same thing too. do you have anything?

In my case i have a start date and number of days a task takes. i would like to get calculated end date based on the working days (without weekends or holidays).
